com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.ListVerifier

Packages that use ListVerifier 
Package Description
com.github.cowwoc.requirements
The Requirements, DefaultRequirements endpoints.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Classes used to verify preconditions, postconditions and invariants of core Java types.
com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal
Design guide

  • Uses of ListVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements that return ListVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    static <L extends List<E>,​ E>
    ListVerifier<L,​E>    		 DefaultRequirements.assertThat​(L actual, String name)
    Same as DefaultRequirements.requireThat(List, String) but does nothing if assertions are disabled.
    <L extends List<E>,​ E>
    ListVerifier<L,​E>    		 Requirements.assertThat​(L actual, String name)
    Same as Requirements.requireThat(List, String) but does nothing if assertions are disabled.
    static <L extends List<E>,​ E>
    ListVerifier<L,​E>    		 DefaultRequirements.requireThat​(L actual, String name)
    Verifies the requirements of a List.
    <L extends List<E>,​ E>
    ListVerifier<L,​E>    		 Requirements.requireThat​(L actual, String name)
    Verifies the requirements of a List.

  • Uses of ListVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

    Methods in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java that return ListVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Method Description
    <L extends List<E>,​ E>
    ListVerifier<L,​E>    		 JavaRequirements.assertThat​(L actual, String name)
    Same as JavaRequirements.requireThat(List, String) but does nothing if assertions are disabled.
    <L extends List<E>,​ E>
    ListVerifier<L,​E>    		 JavaRequirements.requireThat​(L actual, String name)
    Verifies the requirements of a List.

  • Uses of ListVerifier in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal

    Classes in com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.internal that implement ListVerifier 
    Modifier and Type Class Description
    class  ListVerifierImpl<L extends List<E>,​E>
    An implementation of ListVerifier.
    class  ListVerifierNoOp<L extends List<E>,​E>
    A ListVerifier that does nothing.
